title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Craftsvilla

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Craftsvilla
jsonLd.description:
Craftsvilla invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Rajkot location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Craftsvilla:
Craftsvilla is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Craftsvilla!
